ideation: This animation sequence depicts a serene moon viewing, focusing on gentle, upward arm movements that evoke a sense of peaceful contemplation.  The arms will move gracefully, mirroring the quiet beauty of the scene.  The sequence avoids sudden movements, maintaining a calm and contemplative atmosphere. Frame 1 shows the arms at rest. Frame 2 gently raises the arms, palms up. Frame 3 shows a slight pause, with arms still elevated.  Frame 4 brings the arms down slowly. Frame 5 returns the arms to a neutral position.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely, ready for the night
arms gently lift, palms open to the moon
a slight pause, appreciating the quiet glow
arms slowly descend, the moment fading
arms return to rest, peaceful contemplation ends
